This '''R5 unit''' was owned by a [[Jawajawa clan|Jawa clan]] who had presumably salvaged it. The droid was defective, and despite hours of long work clan's [[Unidentified Jawa Hero|mechanic]] failed to completely repair it. The frustrated Jawa angrily kicked the droid causing it to topple over. As the Jawa mechanic angrily chased away fellow clan members who had been mocking the mechanic, the droid suddenly reactivated, apparently functioning perfectly.

Later, the droid helped the Jawa mechanic repair a stolen wrecked [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], and also assisted the Jawa in his successful attempt at stealing a downed [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced]] from a trio of salvagers.

==Behind the scenes==
This droid only appears in the story ''[[Oh!! Jawajawa]]'', published in ''[[Star Wars Manga: Silver]]'' issue of [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga]]. Originally published in Japan, those stories were considered to be of "fuzzy" continuity by Lucasfilm.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> Since then, they have been republished in English in the United Kingdom under [[Infinities]] label, which established the material in them as [[Canon|non-canonical]].
